title: Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) — CBPP Policy Explainer
description: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities policy explainer / chart book on Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI), describing how the program provides benefits to workers with serious long-lasting impairments, who qualifies, benefit levels, financing, and program facts. Updated February 28, 2025. Provides authoritative plain-language background and summary statistics useful for contextualizing DDS disability-determination work.

source.publisher: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities (CBPP)
source.title: Social Security Disability Insurance (Policy Basics / Chart Book)

Page marked 'Updated February 28, 2025' so temporal_coverage start==end (2025). Markdown scrape retains a cookie-policy banner and site navigation. This directory also contains cbpp-ssdi-overview.html and cbpp-ss-research.source.txt, which are intentionally NOT carded per scope (md only). No tabular columns to declare.
